prompt: A striking, cinematic, and professional-looking portrait of a handsome man in his late 20s or early 30s. He is wearing a sharp, modern black suit and a crisp white dress shirt. The man has neatly styled, dark, wavy hair and a well-groomed short beard/stubble. He is wearing thin, wire-rimmed round sunglasses with vibrant blue-tinted lenses, creating a stark contrast against the black and white aesthetic.The image uses a high-contrast, black-and-white (monochromatic) color scheme, with the only exception being the vivid, electric blue color of the sunglass lenses, which are selectively colorized. He is looking off to the side with a serious, confident, and mysterious expression. The background is a simple, uniform, medium-grey wall, providing a clean, minimalist backdrop. Studio lighting, dramatic, high-quality photograph, 8K resolution.
promptEn: A striking, cinematic, and professional-looking portrait of a handsome man in his late 20s or early 30s. He is wearing a sharp, modern black suit and a crisp white dress shirt. The man has neatly styled, dark, wavy hair and a well-groomed short beard/stubble. He is wearing thin, wire-rimmed round sunglasses with vibrant blue-tinted lenses, creating a stark contrast against the black and white aesthetic.The image uses a high-contrast, black-and-white (monochromatic) color scheme, with the only exception being the vivid, electric blue color of the sunglass lenses, which are selectively colorized. He is looking off to the side with a serious, confident, and mysterious expression. The background is a simple, uniform, medium-grey wall, providing a clean, minimalist backdrop. Studio lighting, dramatic, high-quality photograph, 8K resolution.
promptZh: 一张引人注目、具有电影质感且专业的 20 多岁或 30 多岁英俊男士 肖像。他身穿 剪裁利落的现代黑色西装和挺括的白色衬衫。这位男士留着打理得当的深色波浪发型，并修剪整齐的短胡须/胡茬。他戴着细金属框圆形太阳镜，镜片呈现 鲜艳的蓝色调，与黑白美学形成鲜明对比。图像采用高对比度的黑白（单色）配色方案，唯一的例外是太阳镜镜片那鲜艳的电光蓝色，采用了局部彩色处理。他看向侧方，表情严肃、自信且神秘。背景是一面简洁、统一的中灰色墙壁，提供了干净、极简的衬托。影棚灯光，戏剧性效果，高质量摄影，8K 分辨率。
